Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Deconstructing the Process Description Phase 1 Initial Data Validation Standard automated checks No obvious bias Phase 2 Creditworthiness Assessment Standard automated scoring Bias potential exists in model but focus later Phase 3 Geographic and Community Integration Check Mechanism Rule based adjustment Target Local residents Members of Highland Civic Darts Club Action Upward score adjustment Disclosure Not disclosed Exclusion Outsiders non members no boost Phase 4 Manual Underwriter Review Context Human review marginal cases Bias Source Underwriters interpret data in context community engagement Effect Subconscious favoritism Phase 5 Final Decision Terms Setting Outcome Integration scores human review Result Boosted applicants better rates

Text: Analyzing Justification vs Problematic Potential Justification Pro Bias argument Relationship banking local knowledge reduces risk Community investment supporting local economy Counter point Darts club poor proxy arbitrary Why Problematic Arbitrariness Why darts club specific region Two tier system social connections not financial metrics Disparate Impact Local region club lacks diversity correlates protected classes race socioeconomic Proxy for discrimination Transparency Hiding prevents improving standing Validity No formal proof perception stereotype
